## What does this PR do?

One-paragraph summary.

## Why is this change needed?

Reference the issue it closes (`Closes #123`) or describe the gap.

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-features -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --all-features` passes (88 tests)
- [ ] I added a test for new behavior (or explained why not)
- [ ] I updated docs (`docs/en` *and* `docs/zh`) when behavior changed
- [ ] No new clippy warnings

## Migration / Breaking Changes

If users need to do anything (rebuild indexes, re-memorize, change `--admin-token`), say so explicitly.

## Screenshots / API samples (optional)

For HTTP/MCP changes, paste a working `curl` / JSON snippet.
